title: guilford-engine output
description: Structured output from the Guilford Engine: genuinely divergent ideas generated across five cognitive dimensions.

id.description: Unique idea identifier, e.g. g1, g2, g3

problem.description: The sub-problem this idea addresses (one sentence)

feasibility.description: Implementation feasibility tag from the Pareto front

feasibility_condition.description: For Stretch/Moonshot: what would need to be true for this to work

default_answer.description: The obvious approach every other AI would give first
